evals.prompt: Analyze this voice memo for prosody and give me practical delivery feedback.
evals.expected_output: Runs the audio analyzer, cites generated report artifacts, summarizes pitch, pacing, pauses, emphasis, and limitations.

evals.prompt: Visualize the prosody of this narration take.
evals.expected_output: Generates an HTML visual report with waveform, energy, pitch contour, pause bands, and summary metrics.

evals.prompt: Compare these two takes and tell me which one has better clarity and pacing.
evals.expected_output: Runs one analysis per file, compares speaking rate when available, pause structure, rough pitch variety, possible acoustic peaks, and explains goal-dependent tradeoffs.

evals.prompt: Show the speaker's pacing and pause progression across these five voice memos.
evals.expected_output: Labels each run with speaker/goal/take metadata, appends compact history records, compares stable trend metrics over time, and states transcript/alignment caveats.

evals.prompt: Find candidate prosodic patterns in this accent-analysis clip and visualize the contours.
evals.expected_output: Runs the analyzer, reports pattern_analysis candidates and families, shows contour-map visualization in HTML, and avoids accent diagnosis claims.

evals.prompt: This clip is a known prosodic pattern exemplar; visualize it without renaming the pattern.
evals.expected_output: Runs with --pattern-label, preserves the analyst-supplied label, surfaces contour candidates, and states fallback-method limitations.

evals.prompt: Build a reusable pattern library from this approved clip, then use it to match a future clip.
evals.expected_output: Copies or creates a pattern library, runs with --pattern-library and --save-pattern-label, saves an approved exemplar, reruns a future clip against the same library, and reports library match scores without making diagnostic claims.

evals.prompt: The analyst accepted candidate #2 as a rise-fall focus arc. Save that exact pattern and make the report show it clearly.
evals.expected_output: Runs with --pattern-library, --save-pattern-label, and --save-pattern-rank 2; preserves the analyst label; updates the library JSON; and shows the saved exemplar in report.md, report.html, and prosody.json.

evals.prompt: Use Praat and DTW to match this new clip against the approved pattern library.
evals.expected_output: Runs with --pitch-method praat when Praat/Parselmouth is installed, uses --library-match-method dtw or hybrid, reports analyzer.pitch_method, match_method, dtw_score, correlation_score, and preserves diagnostic guardrails.

evals.prompt: Open the report, approve candidate #2 as a rise-fall focus arc, add a note, and export the review JSON.
evals.expected_output: Uses the HTML Pattern Review Workbench, selects candidate #2, sets decision to approved, preserves the analyst label and notes, exports valid JSON with source_audio, candidate rank, signature, sequence, library matches when present, and a suggested_cli using --save-pattern-rank 2.
